service.name: Mistral AI API
service.description_for_ai: European AI company with strong open-weight models. Best for: code generation (Codestral), multilingual European tasks, cost-efficient production. OpenAI-compatible API. Mistral Small is one of the cheapest quality models. Strong on French, German, Spanish, Italian.

auth.how_to_get: Register at https://console.mistral.ai — free tier available
auth.cost: Mistral Small 3.1: $0.10/$0.30 per 1M tokens. Mistral Large 3: $2/$6. Codestral: $0.30/$0.90

capabilities.description_for_ai: OpenAI-compatible chat completions. Drop-in replacement for OpenAI API — same format, different base URL. Best for European languages and cost-efficient production.

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in response

capabilities.description_for_ai: Code-specific completion using Codestral. Optimized for 80+ programming languages. Best Mistral model for coding tasks.

model.description: AI/ML model identifier to use for this request

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in response

agent_hints.openai_compat: 100% OpenAI-compatible. Change base URL to https://api.mistral.ai/v1 and swap model names. Same SDK works.
agent_hints.model_choice: mistral-small-latest for high-volume cheap tasks. mistral-large-latest for complex reasoning. codestral-latest for code.
agent_hints.european_strength: Mistral models are trained with stronger European language data — prefer over OpenAI for French/German/Spanish/Italian tasks.
agent_hints.open_source: Mistral 7B and Mixtral 8x7B are open-weight and can be self-hosted. API is for managed hosting.
